hyperedges.label: ag-kit vendoring pipeline
hyperedges.description: Full ag-kit vendoring: agkit-source.json pins commit -> sync-agkit.mjs fetches -> agkit/transform.mjs converts -> templates/ag-kit/ stored -> agkit-catalog.mjs maps -> asset-catalog.mjs exports -> plan.mjs consumes.

hyperedges.label: frontmatter compliance pipeline
hyperedges.description: Frontmatter normalization flow: validate/frontmatter.mjs provides logic -> agkit/transform.mjs uses it during vendoring -> apply.mjs uses it as safety net on write -> plugin hook auto-fixes on edit -> normalize script for dev-time bulk fix.

hyperedges.label: unit testing pillar
hyperedges.description: Testing gap detection and scaffolding: testing-catalog.mjs recommends framework -> detect/testing.mjs populates profile.testing -> render.mjs shows in report -> generate/claude-md.mjs adds note -> plan.mjs adds notes[] entry -> setup-testing skill configures at runtime.

hyperedges.label: drizzle stack artifacts
hyperedges.description: Drizzle ORM artifact set: stack-keys.mjs adds drizzle key -> project-catalog registers rules (db-schema, db-access), hook (block-drizzle-direct), skill (drizzle-migration-system) -> plan.mjs applies per detected stack.

hyperedges.label: GitHub PM pillar
hyperedges.description: GitHub PM feature set: detect/github-pm.mjs populates profile.githubPM -> github-pm-catalog registers skill, commands, templates, workflows -> asset-catalog barrel -> plan.mjs applies (all defaultSelected: false).

nodes.label: lib/agkit/transform.mjs
nodes.description: Pure transforms for vendoring ag-kit assets into templates/ag-kit/. Converts Antigravity frontmatter to Claude Code conventions. Exports: parseFrontmatter, renderFrontmatter, mapAgentTools, cleanAgentMarkdown, cleanSkillMarkdown, cleanCommandMarkdown, cleanScript. No IO.

nodes.label: lib/data/agkit-catalog.mjs
nodes.description: Catalog module mapping stack keys to ag-kit assets. Exports: AGKIT_COMMON, AGKIT_BY_STACK, selectAgkitAssets, allAgkitAssets. Consumed via asset-catalog.mjs barrel only.

properties.note: AGKIT_COMMANDS excludes 'status' (collides with Claude Code built-in)

nodes.label: scripts/agkit-source.json
nodes.description: Pins ag-kit upstream source: repo vudovn/ag-kit, commit a909d03c808296b86cc124e09acf5f1c7efa4e49, rawBase and apiBase for fetch.

nodes.label: scripts/sync-agkit.mjs
nodes.description: Vendoring script: resolves commit, calls GitHub trees API recursively, fetches content via raw CDN, applies agkit/transform.mjs transforms, writes templates/ag-kit/, stamps MANIFEST.json with provenance, pins commit. Mirrors sync-ecc.mjs pattern.

nodes.label: templates/ag-kit/
nodes.description: Vendored ag-kit assets: converted agents, skills, workflows (commands). Includes MANIFEST.json with provenance and LICENSE. Excluded from lint/typecheck.

nodes.label: lib/data/asset-catalog.mjs
nodes.description: Barrel re-exporting all distributable-asset catalogs: ecc-catalog, agkit-catalog, project-catalog, tools-catalog, github-pm-catalog. Single import surface for plan.mjs.

nodes.label: lib/data/skill-map.mjs
nodes.description: New pure module. Exports skillsForProfile(profile) -> Array<{label, skill, description}>. Maps frameworks, dependencies, and primaryLanguage to skill entries for the skills block in generated CLAUDE.md.

nodes.label: lib/generate/claude-md.mjs
nodes.description: Generator for CLAUDE.md content. renderRootClaudeMd and renderDomainClaudeMd. Extended with: skillsBlock(profile) export, two AI-ENRICH markers (architecture map, conventions), testing note with /setup-testing link when unit test gap detected.

nodes.label: lib/generate/format-hook.mjs
nodes.description: New pure generator. renderFormatOnEdit(profile: ProjectProfile) -> string. Produces language-aware PostToolUse format-on-edit hook source with blocks: JS_BLOCK (biome/prettier), PHP_BLOCK (pint), PYTHON_BLOCK (ruff/black), GO_BLOCK (gofmt), RUST_BLOCK (rustfmt), RUBY_BLOCK (rubocop), DART_BLOCK, CC_BLOCK (clang-format). Fallback: JS/TS block.

nodes.label: lib/generate/verify.mjs
nodes.description: Pure generator. renderVerifyOnStop(profile) -> string | null. Produces strict Stop hook source embedding detected lint/typecheck commands. Returns null when neither command exists (caller falls back to static reminder).

nodes.label: lib/validate/frontmatter.mjs
nodes.description: Pure validator/normalizer for agent/skill/command/rule frontmatter. Exports: detectAssetType(relPath) -> AssetType, normalizeToolsValue(value) -> string, validateFrontmatter(content, type) -> FrontmatterResult. Used by agkit/transform, apply, scripts, hooks.

rulesFormatting.tools_field: comma-separated scalar, no quotes, no JSON arrays

nodes.label: lib/validate/index.mjs
nodes.description: Barrel re-exporting lib/validate/frontmatter.mjs. Entry point for validate module.

nodes.label: lib/data/testing-catalog.mjs
nodes.description: Decision catalog (NOT in asset-catalog barrel). recommendTesting(profile) -> TestingRecipe | null. E2E_FRAMEWORKS set excludes Playwright/Cypress from unit-test gap detection. Recipes for: react, vue, ts-vite, ts-node, php-laravel, php, python, django, fastapi, go, rust, java-spring, java-quarkus, java, csharp.

nodes.label: lib/detect/testing.mjs
nodes.description: New detector. detectTesting(profile, files) -> TestingInfo. Reads already-collected file list + profile; no new IO. Detects unit-test gap by checking framework deps, excluding E2E-only frameworks.

nodes.label: lib/detect/github-pm.mjs
nodes.description: Detector for GitHub PM features. detectGitHubPM(profile, files) -> GitHubPMInfo. Reads profile.vcs.remoteUrl and stats paths. Populates: detected (github.com remote + isGit), hasIssueTemplates, hasWorkflows, hasPmConfig.

nodes.label: lib/data/github-pm-catalog.mjs
nodes.description: Catalog for GitHub PM artifacts. selectGitHubPMAssets(profile) -> assets. Includes: github-pm skill, vendored github-issues and github-project skills, issue templates, PR template, 4 GitHub Actions workflows, 5 /pm:* commands. defaultSelected: false for all.

nodes.label: lib/data/project-catalog.mjs
nodes.description: First-party skills+hooks catalog. PROJECT_COMMON (stack-independent), PROJECT_BY_STACK (per-stack, includes coding standards rules and swapo-extracted artifacts), PROJECT_HOOK_FILES (hooks for all targets), PROJECT_HOOK_BY_STACK (stack-specific hooks e.g. block-drizzle-direct for drizzle). Exports: selectProjectAssets, selectProjectHooks.

nodes.label: lib/data/stack-keys.mjs
nodes.description: Pure profile -> stack-key resolver. New keys added: drizzle, shadcn. Full key set: react, vue, typescript, python, go, rust, java, java-spring, java-quarkus, kotlin, php, php-laravel, php-adianti, csharp, cpp, dart, drizzle, shadcn, mobile, games.

nodes.label: lib/plan.mjs
nodes.description: Core plan builder. buildPlan(profile, ctx) -> HarnessPlan. Imports from asset-catalog barrel, plan sub-modules. Artifact category enum includes: claude-md, rules, settings, mcp, hooks, skills, agents, commands, tools, worktree, lsp, docs, script, github-pm. ctx.strict controls verify-on-stop generation; ctx.largeFiles controls large-file guard wiring. Produces notes[] for testing/other gaps.

nodes.label: lib/apply.mjs
nodes.description: Applies HarnessPlan to disk. applyPlan(plan, root, opts). Safe by default: dryRun unless false, never overwrites differing file without force. Updates .gitignore idempotently under # aia-harness header. Normalizes frontmatter for .md artifacts before writing (uses validateFrontmatter from lib/validate/frontmatter.mjs). Handles directory artifacts (cpSync).

nodes.label: lib/profile.mjs
nodes.description: Type-only module. JSDoc typedefs for: LanguageInfo, PackageManagerInfo, FrameworkInfo, CommandSet, MonorepoInfo, DomainInfo, ArchitectureInfo, ExistingHarness, VcsInfo (with remoteUrl added), TestingInfo (new), LargeFilesInfo, GitHubPMInfo (new), ProjectProfile.

nodes.label: lib/render.mjs
nodes.description: Renders diagnosis report as Markdown. renderReport(profile) -> string. Extended with ## Unit tests section (configured/unconfigured + recommended framework) and ## Large source files section. Imports commandsBlock from generate/claude-md.mjs.

nodes.label: hooks/hooks.json
nodes.description: Plugin-level hooks config. Registers SessionStart hook: runs hooks/scripts/suggest-harness.sh with 10s timeout.

nodes.label: hooks/scripts/suggest-harness.sh
nodes.description: SessionStart hook script. Two checks: (1) if no CLAUDE.md and no .claude/ dir, suggest /aia-harness:init; (2) check for newer plugin version at most once per 24h by comparing installed version from plugin.json with remote registry, rate-limited via cache file in ~/.claude/.

nodes.label: templates/rules/
nodes.description: Per-stack coding standards rules and swapo-extracted path-scoped rules. Structure: templates/rules/<stack>/coding-standards.md for each stack, plus next/api-security.md, drizzle/db-schema.md, drizzle/db-access.md, shadcn/tsx-screen.md, shadcn/mobile-first.md, react/form-validation.md.

nodes.label: templates/hooks/block-drizzle-direct.mjs
nodes.description: PreToolUse guard hook. Hard-blocks (exit 2) drizzle-kit push, drizzle-kit drop, npm run db:push, npm run db:drop. Allows migrate and generate commands. Registered in PROJECT_HOOK_BY_STACK[drizzle].

nodes.label: templates/skills/setup-testing/
nodes.description: Agentic skill distributed to target projects. Installs unit test framework, writes 1 real test in an existing module, wires test script, iterates until green. Registered in PROJECT_COMMON.skills. contextCost: 0 (lazy).

nodes.label: templates/skills/github-pm/
nodes.description: First-party skill for GitHub PM workflow. Includes SKILL.md + references: 01-criar-issue, 02-trabalhar-issue, 03-fechar-issue, 04-backlog, pm-config-schema. Shell scripts: check-pr-status.sh, worktree-safety-check.sh.

properties.workflow: Backlog -> In Progress -> In Review -> Done

nodes.label: templates/skills/drizzle-migration-system/
nodes.description: Skill ported from swapo-app, genericized. SKILL.md + reference files: migrate.ts, migration-runner.ts, patch-migrations.ts. Stack-key: drizzle.

nodes.label: templates/skills/nextjs-eslint-rules/
nodes.description: Skill with 7 ESLint rules ported from swapo-app (generic ones only): require-types-filename, max-lines-clean-code, no-direct-console, no-native-input-elements, require-input-maxlength, no-direct-db-access, require-auth-wrapper. Stack-key: next.

properties.approach: custom ESLint plugin local to target project

nodes.label: templates/skills/structured-logging-pino/
nodes.description: Structured logging skill using pino. Stack-key: typescript (present in all JS/TS projects). contextCost: 0 (lazy, wide availability at negligible cost).

nodes.label: templates/commands/pm/
nodes.description: 10 /pm:* commands for GitHub PM workflow loop in Claude Code. defaultSelected: false.

nodes.label: scripts/normalize-frontmatter.mjs
nodes.description: Dev tool for frontmatter normalization across templates/. Options: --dry-run, --fix-format, --interactive, --report=FILE. Not a production path.

nodes.label: .claude/hooks/validate-template-frontmatter.mjs
nodes.description: Plugin-level PreToolUse hook (not distributed to targets). Auto-fixes frontmatter via updatedInput; emits advisory systemMessage for warnings. Registered in .claude/settings.json.

nodes.label: plan: ag-kit vendoring
nodes.description: Implementation plan for ag-kit as second template source (Tasks 1-5). Mirrors ECC pattern. Key: splitFrontmatter imported from lib/ecc/transform.mjs, AGKIT_COMMANDS excludes 'status'.

nodes.label: plan: CLAUDE.md AI enrichment
nodes.description: Plan for skill-map module + AI-ENRICH markers in CLAUDE.md + 3-pass enrichment in /init (Structure, Source Patterns, Synthesize).

nodes.label: plan: coding standards rules
nodes.description: Plan adding per-stack coding-standards.md rules to templates/rules/<stack>/. All path-scoped, contextCost 0, defaultSelected true, registered in PROJECT_BY_STACK.

nodes.label: plan: language-aware format hook
nodes.description: Plan replacing static format-on-edit.mjs with generated hook. Creates lib/generate/format-hook.mjs, removes static template.

nodes.label: plan: setup-testing pillar
nodes.description: Plan for 6-task testing pillar: detect gap, catalog recipes, render in report/CLAUDE.md/plan notes, setup-testing skill.

nodes.label: plan: GitHub PM pillar
nodes.description: Large plan for GitHub PM pillar: detector, catalog, vendored skills, templates, commands, GitHub Actions, /add-github-pm command.

nodes.label: plan: frontmatter compliance
nodes.description: Plan for 5-component frontmatter compliance: validate module, ecc transform update, normalize script, apply.mjs safety net, plugin PreToolUse hook.

nodes.label: plan: swapo Next/Drizzle/shadcn artifacts
nodes.description: Plan extracting 10 artifacts from swapo-app harness: 6 rules, 1 hook, 3 skills. Drizzle detection added to frameworks.mjs and stack-keys.mjs.

nodes.label: design: ag-kit vendoring
nodes.description: Design spec for ag-kit vendoring. Parallel module to ECC. Frontmatter conversion rules: remove skills:, force model:sonnet, rewrite tools: (ViewCodeItem->drop, FindByName->Glob, Agent->Task). ag-kit upstream: 21 agents, 46 skills, 14 workflows, 4 scripts.

nodes.label: design: CLAUDE.md AI enrichment
nodes.description: Design: static skillsBlock from engine (deterministic), rich architecture map from agent during /init (3-pass post-apply). Fail-open if AI fails (skeleton remains). skill-map.mjs uses frameworks, deps, primaryLanguage.

nodes.label: design: setup-testing pillar
nodes.description: Design: approach A chosen (engine detects+recommends, skill configures). E2E frameworks excluded from gap. Setup-testing always installed (lazy). Three decisions: scaffold+install+green, 1 real test, default-per-stack.

nodes.label: design: strict verify-on-stop
nodes.description: Design for strict Stop hook: default ON, --no-strict opts out. Session-scoped gating via set-files-changed.mjs PostToolUse hook. Anti-loop via stop_hook_active guard. Fail-open on missing runtime (ENOENT/127). Uses detected profile.commands.lint/.typecheck verbatim.

nodes.label: design: GitHub PM pillar
nodes.description: Design for GitHub PM pillar. Upstream sources: github/awesome-copilot (MIT), netresearch/github-project-skill (MIT AND CC-BY-SA-4.0). detectGitHubPM checks remoteUrl contains github.com. pm-config.json safe by default (not overwritten). All artifacts defaultSelected: false.

nodes.label: design: frontmatter compliance
nodes.description: Design: two root causes (ECC tools as JSON array, ag-kit quoted MCP tools). 3 components: validate module, normalize script, apply safety net (4th: ecc transform update, 5th: plugin hook). Tools field format: CSV scalar, no quotes, no JSON arrays.

nodes.label: design: swapo Next/Drizzle/shadcn
nodes.description: Design: two layers (stack-key installs artifact, paths: frontmatter gates loading). block-drizzle-direct: hard-block push/drop, allow migrate/generate. structured-logging-pino on typescript key (wide coverage, lazy). nextjs-eslint-rules as local custom ESLint plugin (not no-restricted-* approximations).

links.source_location: Part A and B run in parallel

links.label: maps stack keys to template assets
reads pinned commit and repo config
single import surface for all catalogs
PROJECT_BY_STACK entries for coding standards and swapo rules
add drizzle and shadcn stack keys

hyperedges.label: ag-kit vendoring pipeline
hyperedges.description: Full ag-kit vendoring: agkit-source.json pins commit -> sync-agkit.mjs fetches -> agkit/transform.mjs converts -> templates/ag-kit/ stored -> agkit-catalog.mjs maps -> asset-catalog.mjs exports -> plan.mjs consumes.

hyperedges.label: frontmatter compliance pipeline
hyperedges.description: Frontmatter normalization flow: validate/frontmatter.mjs provides logic -> agkit/transform.mjs uses it during vendoring -> apply.mjs uses it as safety net on write -> plugin hook auto-fixes on edit -> normalize script for dev-time bulk fix.

hyperedges.label: unit testing pillar
hyperedges.description: Testing gap detection and scaffolding: testing-catalog.mjs recommends framework -> detect/testing.mjs populates profile.testing -> render.mjs shows in report -> generate/claude-md.mjs adds note -> plan.mjs adds notes[] entry -> setup-testing skill configures at runtime.

hyperedges.label: drizzle stack artifacts
hyperedges.description: Drizzle ORM artifact set: stack-keys.mjs adds drizzle key -> project-catalog registers rules (db-schema, db-access), hook (block-drizzle-direct), skill (drizzle-migration-system) -> plan.mjs applies per detected stack.

hyperedges.label: GitHub PM pillar
hyperedges.description: GitHub PM feature set: detect/github-pm.mjs populates profile.githubPM -> github-pm-catalog registers skill, commands, templates, workflows -> asset-catalog barrel -> plan.mjs applies (all defaultSelected: false).
